---
title: "Table S11 — R² Difference Bootstrap"
subtitle: "Render this document only after run_bootstrap.R has completed"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    df-print: kable
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
source(here::here("R", "00_paths.R"))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(gt))
```

```{r}
#| label: check-csv
boot_csv <- file.path(CSV_DIR, "supplements",
                      "S20_r2_difference_bootstrap_all_levels.csv")
if (!file.exists(boot_csv)) {
  stop("Bootstrap CSV not found: ", boot_csv,
       "\nRun:  Rscript run_bootstrap.R   (from the repo root)")
}
boot_tbl <- readr::read_csv(boot_csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
```

Paired nonparametric bootstrap of pairwise $\Delta R^2$ differences between
architectures on the identical-case common-case sample.
`r unique(boot_tbl$B_target)` replicates; MLR+FIML for continuous outcomes,
WLSMV+probit for donor status; admissible solutions only (converged, no Heywood
cases); 95 % percentile CI + bias-corrected CI; Holm adjustment per outcome.

```{r}
#| label: table-s11
boot_tbl |>
  select(Outcome, Model_A, Model_B, R2_A, R2_B,
         Delta_R2, CI_low, CI_high, p_value, p_holm, B, conv_rate) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, 3))) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_header(
    "Table S11. Bootstrap ΔR² between brand-equity architectures",
    subtitle = "Identical-case sample; 95 % percentile CI; Holm-adjusted p"
  ) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(R2_A, R2_B, Delta_R2, CI_low, CI_high),
             decimals = 3) |>
  fmt_number(columns = c(p_value, p_holm), decimals = 3) |>
  fmt_number(columns = conv_rate, decimals = 2) |>
  sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
  tab_footnote("Model_A / Model_B: bo_original = Boenigk & Becker; fc_core_B = Faircloth Core B; ro_original = Ríos Romero et al.")
```
